text_block_list.text:
To celebrate New Year's, Fuji Kiseki and I go on
our first shrine visit of the year together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Have you decided what to pray for yet?
choice_data_list:
I'm praying you have a lot of success in your
senior year, of course.

I'm praying you have a lot of success in your
senior year, of course.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a coincidence! I'm going to pray for
the same thing!

We shuffle into line to wait for our turn at the
shrine...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that Fuji Kiseki?!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, wow! H-hello! I always watch your races! I'm
looking forward to watching this year too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I get the feeling I'll have great luck
this year after receiving such sweet words of
support.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my very best, so I hope you'll continue
cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: I-I will!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Holy crap, that's Fuji Kiseki!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text:
No way, are you for real?! Wh-what should we do?
Should we go say hi?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My, my, it's shaping up to be quite a day.

More and more people notice her, and Fuji Kiseki
receives an endless stream of well wishes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. It feels strange to have so many people
calling out to me on New Year's Day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I suppose this is proof that I'm on everyone's
radars now. Let's work hard this year too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're done with our shrine visit, can I
talk to you about our plans for today?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know you've given me time off today since it's
New Year's and all...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But, after receiving so much support from
everyone, I really want to run!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? I'd like to train, but only if
you're all right with it.

As much as I want to respect her desire to
practice, I'd like her to rest too...
choice_data_list: You should use today to rest up.
Let's sign you up for a New Year's marathon.
Let's do research on the races you plan to run!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're right. I guess I got a little carried away.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. My goal for today is to rest to my
heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, since we're out already, why don't we see
what kind of New Year's deals they have at the
shopping district?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Two red and white bean buns coming right up!
Say, aren't you Fuji Kiseki?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, you know me?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Everyone does! You've been working
so hard!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll do just fantastic this year too!
Here, have an extra treat, on the house!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wow, thank you so much! I'll do my best!

No matter where we go, it seems a lot of people
have high hopes for Fuji Kiseki.

The challenges we'll be facing this year will be
difficult, but thanks to everyone's support, she's
fired up and ready for anything!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
A New Year's marathon, huh? That's a great idea.
It'll be like I'm training even though I'm still on
break!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, I recall my sweet ponies talking
excitedly about a marathon in the shopping
district.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let's see if it's still possible to sign up!

Thankfully, Fuji Kiseki is able to register for and
run in the shopping district's marathon without a
hitch.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! She's really here! She's actually running the
marathon!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member B
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Fujiii!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks for cheering me on, my ponies!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Members
text_block_list.text: Fujiii! We love youuu!

No matter where we go, it seems a lot of people
have high hopes for Fuji Kiseki.

The challenges we'll be facing this year will be
difficult, but thanks to everyone's support, she's
fired up and ready for anything!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The steep hill at the end of the final stretch will
be killer. I'll have to be careful to reserve enough
energy for it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, these files are about last year's
Takamatsunomiya Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, my vision's blurry. I think I overdid it with my
research...

No matter where we go, it seems a lot of people
have high hopes for Fuji Kiseki.

The challenges we'll be facing this year will be
difficult, but thanks to everyone's support, she's
fired up and ready for anything!
